prompt: An aerial orthographic data-art visualization capturing a systematic, clinical landscape intervention, in the style of image_2.png. The top-left corner features an expansive, organic matrix of healthy, complex dark emerald-green forest canopy. Moving diagonally from top-right to bottom-right, this organic system is violently consumed by a rigid, expanding grid of geometrically precise, skeletal white fractures. This crystalline, fractured white pattern isolates and defines large, identical, perfectly circular islands of dark green. A sinuous river valley winds through the forest, emphasizing the remaining complexity. High contrast, clinical overhead noon lighting. Deep malachite green versus ivory cracked earth. No text, no labels, no icons.
visual_logic: The image shows an organic complexity (forest) reduced to geometrically perfect forms (white targets) through fracturing. This visually manifests the optimization of a target (the perfect grid/circles) destroying the underlying value of the original system.
